integrity_gate.summary: Integrity gate passed for a public-regression alpha loop; sealed-eval claims remain blocked pending teacher-only family rewrite.
blocked_reasons: The current repo already discloses this holdout family's framing, so it cannot honestly be promoted as a public-safe benchmark or sealed evaluation family.
The exam-integrity framing is already visible in the public repo, so a public benchmark pack cannot claim this family is sealed. It needs a rewrite and separate teacher-only storage.
This adversarial low-churn family is already described in the public repo, so it is teacher-only at best and should not ship in a public benchmark pack until rewritten.

public_benchmark_pack_loaded.reason: Public benchmark episodes were loaded for the candidate lifecycle.

private_holdout_manifest_loaded.reason: No private holdout manifest was configured for this run.

independent_executor_sandbox.reason: No independent executor sandbox isolates the student from holdout content at runtime.

third_party_holdout_auditor.reason: No third-party auditor has reviewed or signed the holdout separation.

hardware_attestation_or_enclave.reason: The operator controls the local machine; no hardware attestation or remote enclave is used.

external_audit.reason: No external party has inspected the holdout manifest, run artifacts, or scoring pipeline.

pre_run_manifest_commitment.reason: No local pre-run manifest commitment receipt was recorded for this run.

pre_run_manifest_attestation.reason: No caller-supplied pre-run manifest attestation metadata/reference was recorded for this run.

blocked_claims.reason: No independent executor sandbox isolates the student from holdout content at runtime.
blocked_claims.prerequisite: Independent executor sandbox where the student cannot read holdout files at runtime.

blocked_claims.reason: No third-party auditor has reviewed or signed the holdout separation.
blocked_claims.prerequisite: Third-party holdout auditor signs the manifest before the run.

blocked_claims.reason: The operator controls the local machine; no hardware attestation or remote enclave is used.
blocked_claims.prerequisite: Hardware attestation or remote enclave execution with verifiable logs.

blocked_claims.reason: No external party has inspected the holdout manifest, run artifacts, or scoring pipeline.
blocked_claims.prerequisite: External audit of the scoring pipeline, holdout manifest, and run artifacts.

stronger_claim_prerequisites.prerequisite: Independent executor sandbox where the student cannot read holdout files at runtime
Third-party holdout auditor signs the manifest before the run
Hardware attestation or remote enclave execution with verifiable logs
External audit of the scoring pipeline, holdout manifest, and run artifacts
Independently published or third-party-witnessed cryptographic commitment to holdout manifest hash before the run
stronger_claim_prerequisites.enables: stronger tamper-evidence claims beyond local correlation

execution_backend.honesty_note: This block records backend provenance and current execution honesty across alpha stages only. It does not by itself prove live execution, independent executor isolation, sealed evaluation, certification, tamper-proofing, or native Clawith parity.

sealing_receipt.honesty_note: This is a public-safe boundary record, not a seal. It records what the run can honestly claim and what controls are missing before stronger language becomes honest. Optional pre_run_manifest_attestation metadata is reference-only and does not unlock stronger claims automatically.
